sections.title: 1. Classes and Objects — Deep Dive
sections.content: Everything in Python is an object. Classes are blueprints. Objects are instances.

sections.title: 2. Inheritance — All Types
sections.content: Python supports single, multiple, and multilevel inheritance. super() calls parent methods.

sections.title: 3. Abstract Classes and Interfaces
sections.content: Abstract classes define a contract that subclasses must implement. Use abc module.

sections.title: 4. Properties and Descriptors
sections.content: @property creates managed attributes with getter, setter, and deleter.

sections.title: 5. Dunder Methods — Complete List
sections.content: Dunder (magic) methods let your objects work with Python built-ins and operators.
